title: juncus arcticus var. littoralis
intro: Juncus arcticus var. littoralis, also known as littoral rush, is a variety of the Arctic rush plant that grows in wetland environments, particularly in coastal areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Juncus arcticus var. littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including coughs, colds, and skin infections.
